intent: Write a community-sentiment dashboard on 'cat owner essentials', mixing storefront signals with forum pain points. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the pet-supplies category and collect at least 4 cat-relevant products across feeding, litter/hygiene, health, and enrichment. Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/AskReddit AND /f/LifeProTips for posts on cat ownership surprises, hidden costs, and items that matter more than owners expect. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) present the 4 storefront picks with data, (b) surface at least three pain points from Reddit, (c) match each pain point to either a storefront product that addresses it or a gap in the catalog, (d) conclude with a buying priority for a first-week cat rescue. Cite every claim.
